Good, the center is now gray again. The 3x3 grid has the correct pattern (top-right, middle-left, bottom-right). But the level is still not completed.
Let me think about what else could be needed. The bar has a cursor that can be moved. Maybe I need to move the cursor to a specific position to "confirm" the pattern.
Looking at the bar, the cursor is currently at some position in the right section. Let me try moving the cursor to different positions and see what happens.
Actually, let me try a different approach. Maybe the bar is a "color picker" or "pattern selector". The left section (blue frame) might be the "submit" button, and the right section is the "workspace".
Let me try clicking on the left section of the bar (the blue frame) to see if it triggers the level completion check.
Wait, I already tried that (transition 71), and it didn't work.
Let me try moving the cursor to the left section of the bar using LEFT key and then clicking.
Actually, let me first check if the cursor can move into the left section. The left section is at cols 13-16, and the right section is at cols 34-41. There's a gap between them (cols 17-33).
Let me try pressing LEFT multiple times to move the cursor all the way to the left and see what happens.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try moving the cursor all the way to the left
# The cursor is currently around col 36-37. Let me move it left many times.
action([{'action': 'LEFT'} for _ in range(20)])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
